DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FEDEX CORPORATION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-05-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-05-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY SUE NIX--INSURANCE ADJUSTER. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-05-2014 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, ELMER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FEDEX CORPORATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
